hc2393ab9gea3ag429fg9433g84da2f486cd2: You killed all those goblins, and we couldn't even manage a handful...
h33f58bd5g7c95g4163ga3b7g1c5725fdb016: You made it look so easy, the killing.
hc8f4a344g3801g4082g909bg3966ad52a94c: How do you drow do that - find pleasure in killing? I got a goblin myself, yesterday. Shot her through the throat.
h00e21511g1a16g4c93g9c88g01e5d9ec9a37: That should've killed her, but... she kept gasping. Clawing at the arrow.
h8e09a0e1gf11dg4275ga16dge2956103eacc: It's a refined taste - someone like you would never understand.
hc5feba07g7412g4325gbd44g212b1da09199: I - I guess it's better that way.
h2eafa069g95afg4e52gb59eg38c34d182582: Just embrace it - the adrenaline, the excitement, the power. It makes you stronger.
h9191e8a9g5dcag4145gab2ag5f484b5c5fb9: I don't know if I want that. But... if that's how I get through this...
hfb2bf413gd199g468ega6cagd137c93859c1: We don't all enjoy killing - I just do what I must.
hf26c26e8g4983g43bcgaed9g06764efb95c4: I'm sorry, I just... the goblins, the killing - it scares me.
h52bae926gd6e3g4beeg9ffdgfbd0895c0ce5: I find no pleasure in killing, only regret.
h8480a045g4587g4cb7g8fd7g22755b0318ea: So even someone like you... feels like this? This is how it is? And it's just going to keep happening...
h03ebb8ccg4b49g453dg9cafg8194804a97b4: Glad you were here for those goblins. Picked one off yesterday, myself. Shot her through the throat.
hbcfcf8cagb957g4dffg92b5gf847202e7bbb: Your first kill? Don't worry - it gets easier.
h9ca087bfgc619g42ddga574g9b3d1b64cb8d: That's what Zevlor said, too. I hope you're right.
hb1e30804g5dfbg451ag9832g73b8d900c044: I want to help - I just didn't think it would feel like this.
h722378e0ge581g4deaga71cg989ebb27ff7c: Wish I'd seen that. It's boring when they just drop dead.
h6b59457dg4e4ag49f7gbe8bg242660f8386f: Why? It was terrible. I should've just looked away.
hef3777c7g7ed4g455agb4c6g56b8db969d2b: Taking life always has a cost. You have to feel it, or you'll lose who you are.
h136fa918gc4dcg4b63gb1c2g1ce9ecd89298: I had the same thought. And it's just going to keep happening...
